trivia_bullets.text: Trade the Helm was previewed by Checkpoint Gaming on 2025-01-27. It is a permanent-swap effect in the lineage of Legerdemain and Switcheroo, but can uniquely swap artifacts (including Vehicles) rather than creatures only.

"This looks like a winning vehicle. But you lot ain't a winning team." Speaker unattributed. The line fits the art scenario: a shark-headed humanoid (likely the Keelhaulers team) commandeering a goblin-crewed vehicle mid-race.
sources: magic.wizards.com: Aetherdrift Racing Teams, via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: Cycling {2} ensures Trade the Helm is never a dead card. Compared to Gilded Drake ({1}{U}, creates a body, creature-only swap), Trade the Helm costs {4}{U} as a sorcery but has no failure clause and can target artifacts. EDHREC rank 16,129.

Team cohort flag: The art appears to depict the Keelhaulers (aquatic humanoids, Kari Zev affiliation) boarding a vehicle crewed by goblins. This card is a candidate for Keelhaulers-Rocketeers friction-point team attachment in the graph.
sources: magic.wizards.com: All 10 Aetherdrift Racing Teams, via WebSearch

related_cards.name: Switcheroo
related_cards.note: blue uncommon creature-control-swap sorcery; direct mechanical ancestor

related_cards.name: Gilded Drake
related_cards.note: the {1}{U} benchmark for control-swap; Trade the Helm is the fair version

related_cards.name: Kari Zev, Skyship Raider
related_cards.note: Keelhaulers co-captain, appears in Aetherdrift lore
